# SCORE How Mentoring Works Process

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Explains SCORE’s mentoring process and what a user should do to request and work with a mentor.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns artificial intelligence, disaster readiness, formation during Ideation, Validation, Formation and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

- Explains SCORE’s mentoring process and what a user should do to request and work with a mentor.

## Guardrails
